description.en: Retrieve the latest logs for a specific environment. Useful for debugging and monitoring commands.
description.de: Ruft die neuesten Logs für eine bestimmte Umgebung ab. Hilfreich beim Debugging und Überwachen von Befehlen.
description.es: Retrieve the latest logs for a specific environment. Useful for debugging and monitoring commands.
description.fr: Retrieve the latest logs for a specific environment. Useful for debugging and monitoring commands.
description.ro: Retrieve the latest logs for a specific environment. Useful for debugging and monitoring commands.
description.it: Retrieve the latest logs for a specific environment. Useful for debugging and monitoring commands.

vars.API_KEY: env:LARAVEL_CLOUD_TOKEN|Get your API token from Organization Settings in Laravel Cloud

description.en: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.es: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.fr: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.ro: The ID or slug of the environment.
description.it: The ID or slug of the environment.

output.LOGS: transform:(out) => { return Array.isArray(out.data) ? out.data.map(item => ({ id: item.id, timestamp: item.attributes.timestamp, level: item.attributes.level, message: item.attributes.message })) : []; }
